vigilance_decrement.relevance: DFR operator shifts exceeding 20 min should show degraded detection

change_blindness.relevance: RTCC operators monitoring multiple feeds miss ~50% of scene changes

sa_failure_rate.relevance: 75% of SA failures are comprehension-level; more data ≠ better SA

intent_attribution_accuracy.relevance: Humans attribute intent to geometric shapes — operators will over-attribute intent to ambiguous behavior

automaticity_onset.relevance: RTCC operators develop automatic threat evaluations within months — may increase false positives

legitimacy_cooperation.relevance: DFR surveillance perceived as illegitimate reduces cooperation by ~40% correlation
